data.title: Nasdaq Surges Past 20,000 For First Time, Driven By Tech Gains And Rate Cut Hopes
data.description: The Nasdaq Composite crossed the historic 20,000-point threshold for the first time on Wednesday, driven by broad gains in technology stocks and increased expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2024.

data.title: NYPD Warns About 'Wanted' Posters Targeting Executives, Including AmEx CEO's Image And Crossed-Out UnitedHealth CEO
data.description: The NYPD has issued a warning about threats to healthcare executives following the murder of UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson, highlighting the circulation of "Wanted" posters and rising security concerns amidst extremist reactions online.

data.title: Chrome Was A Scruffy Underdog 16 Years Ago, But Today It Is The Undisputed Top Dog — Is The Internet Browser Saga Finally Coming Full Circle?
data.description: Google Chrome, once a scrappy challenger, now dominates the browser market, but faces regulatory scrutiny for its anti-competitive practices.

data.title: Canadian Oil Sector Hedges Trump Tariff Risk, US Midwest Refineries Could Be Affected
data.description: A proposed 25% tariff on Canadian imports poses a considerable risk to the American Midwest, a region heavily reliant on Canadian oil imports.

data.title: Elton John, TIME's 'Icon Of The Year,' Says Legalizing Cannabis 'Is Greatest Mistake Of All Time'
data.description: Famed pop star Elton John says marijuana is a gateway drug and shares what happened to lead him to become sober.
